2014-T1-P2-S7.trunk: S+be+表：this was the socially concerned chancellor（乍一听，这是位关心社会的财政大臣）
structure: 主句：this was the socially concerned chancellor
├ 现在分词作伴随/定语〔修饰 chancellor〕：trying to change lives for the better
└ 形容词短语作伴随/定语〔修饰 chancellor〕：complete with 「reforms」 to an obviously indulgent system
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 system〕：that demands too little effort from the newly unemployed to find work, and subsidizes laziness
└ 从句内并列谓语：demands too little effort… and subsidizes laziness
2014-T1-P2-S7.logic: 主句 this was the chancellor；trying… 现在分词、complete with… 形容词短语都修饰 chancellor（伴随描述）；that 定语从句修饰 system，从句内并列谓语 demands… and subsidizes…。
notes: trying to change… 与 complete with… 都作 chancellor 的后置修饰/伴随成分。
that demands… and subsidizes…：that 定语从句修饰 system（原文 subsides 应为 subsidizes 补贴/助长）。
demand too little effort … to find work：too little…to 结构；on first hearing 乍一听。

2014-T1-P1-S2.trunk: 部分倒装：Only if … will they be eligible for benefit（只有…他们才有资格领取救济）
structure: 条件状语从句(Only if，置于句首)：Only if the jobless arrive at the job centre with a CV, register for online job search, and start looking for work
└ 从句内并列谓语：arrive…, register…, and start looking…
主句（部分倒装）：will they be eligible for benefit
and then 补充：then they should report weekly rather than fortnightly
2014-T1-P1-S2.logic: Only if 置于句首 → 主句部分倒装（will they be…）；条件从句内三个并列谓语；rather than 对比（每周而非每两周）。
notes: Only if 置于句首 → 主句部分倒装：will they be eligible（只有…他们才…）。
条件从句内并列谓语：arrive…, register…, and start looking…。
weekly rather than fortnightly：rather than 对比（每周而非每两周）。

2014-T1-P4-S5.trunk: S+V+O：the claimant receives a time-limited 「allowance」（申领者领到一笔有时限的「津贴」）
structure: 主句：the claimant receives a time-limited 「allowance」
└ 形容词短语作后置定语〔修饰 allowance〕：conditional on actively seeking a job
分号后（对 allowance 的补充/同位说明）：no entitlement and no insurance, at £71.70 a week, one of the least generous in the EU
2014-T1-P4-S5.logic: 主句 the claimant receives an allowance；conditional on… 形容词短语作定语（以…为条件）；分号后补充说明该津贴（无权益、无保险、每周71.70英镑，欧盟最低之一）。
notes: conditional on actively seeking a job：形容词短语作后置定语修饰 allowance（以积极求职为条件）。
分号后是对该 allowance 的补充/同位说明。
one of the least generous in the EU：one of the + 最高级（欧盟最不慷慨者之一）。
